details.test: Task 1: Same-day emergency repair booking under $100 call-out
Task 2: Request quote for cheapest insulated steel double door under $1,500
Task 3: Enroll in maintenance plan with annual inspection under $25/month
Task 4: Spring repair booking with coupon and total under $250
Task 5: Troubleshooting door won’t close and submit help request
Task 6: Check service availability for 60614 and view nearest branch details
Task 7: Configure repair estimate bundle between $300 and $400 and continue to booking
Task 8: Submit 5-star review for opener installation 10 days ago
Task 9: Schedule annual safety inspection for 3 doors with online deposit
